goal.summary: 建立独立的 complex-coding-reviewer，以 plan-review 和 code-review 两个 profile 提供目标绑定、证据驱动、可复审的工程审查，并让 Planner 与 Executor 通过同一审查契约完成门禁

requirements.summary: 新增 complex-coding-reviewer skill，对外只提供 plan-review 与 code-review 两个明确 profile，并通过渐进披露保持入口简洁
Reviewer 必须定义唯一 closed JSON receipt，包含 profile、scope、target digest、provenance、lenses、findings、verdict、开放计数、限制和 supersedes
plan-review 必须独立审查规划意图、证据、追踪、选项、架构、stage DAG、验证、授权、回滚和过度设计，不能与 code-review 共用领域清单
code-review 必须支持 managed stage-delta、managed final-integration 与 standalone target，并审查正确性、接口、错误路径、架构、复杂度、测试和条件化风险 lens
所有 review pass 必须绑定可重建 target SHA-256；目标变化使旧 receipt stale，复审使用不可变新 attempt 和 supersedes 链
Planner 中正式 Plan Self-Review 和 critique 职责必须迁移到 reviewer，Planner 只生产和修复计划并在 approval 前要求 plan-review passed receipt
Executor 中正式 code review rubric 必须迁移到 reviewer，Executor 只实现和修复代码、运行验证、校验 receipt 并写 compact ledger event
Planner approval、Executor transition/final 和共享 task contract 必须采用当前 reviewer 契约，删除 Markdown 关键词与旧 development_quality review payload，不保留兼容分支
实现 reviewer 单测、双 profile deterministic eval、seeded clean/near-miss fixtures 和 Planner/Reviewer/Executor 联合回归，并接入三平台 CI
Reviewer 必须只读目标且不自动运行 Codex、模型、子代理、远端写入、Git write 或后台服务；远端 acquisition/write 交给其它 skill 组合

stages.title: Reviewer 骨架与唯一审查契约
forbidden_changes: target code or plan mutation by reviewer
automatic Codex, model, subagent, network, Git write or remote write
daemon, database, cache or third-party runtime dependency
generic third review profile
entry_conditions: 批准 attestation 有效并包含 implementation authorization
ART-01 至 ART-04 的 profile、ownership、schema 与 stale 决策已确认
当前 Planner/Executor/skill-evaluation-lab 基线通过
exit_conditions: skill metadata 与 progressive disclosure 结构有效
target、receipt、finding、provenance、supersedes 和 stable errors 只有一个权威定义
三个确定性 CLI 不执行目标代码或 Agent，并通过安全与跨平台 fixtures

stages.title: 三 Skill review contract 原子切换
forbidden_changes: duplicate plan-review checklist retained in Planner
Markdown keyword as canonical review verdict
duplicate code-review rubric retained in Executor
legacy development_quality review payload
stage-delta receipt accepted as final-integration
fake independent-review claim
compatibility parser for archived review payloads
entry_conditions: STG-01 completed in revision 1 and is carried unchanged
revision 1 archive is valid and revision 2 ledger starts with amendment_approved
archived STG-01 commit evidence and current HEAD both resolve to b532208c052ff6e9623e881c030c03e588047bed, and every pre-existing non-task-bundle worktree path is inside STG-02 allowed scope
plan-bundle and Git canonical target fixtures are available
current Planner approval and Executor event/reducer/transition flows are understood
exit_conditions: plan-review has profile-specific lenses and findings-first workflow
Planner produces/fixes plans but delegates formal review
approval rejects missing, wrong-profile, open-major and stale plan receipts
code-review supports stage-delta, final-integration and standalone scopes
STG-02 stage-delta is rebuilt from the carried STG-01 commit to the current worktree and includes both revision 1 Planner carryover changes and revision 2 Executor changes
revision 2 ledger contains only the new compact review receipt payload
source change invalidates old review and stage/final checkers reject stale or wrong scope

stages.title: 双 profile 评估与联合契约回归
forbidden_changes: tests that call Codex, model API, network or target project execution
text-match-only semantic review scoring
fixtures containing only known bugs without clean or near-miss controls
platform skips used to hide canonicalization defects
entry_conditions: new review contract frozen for current implementation
seeded expected claims reviewed against actual fixture behavior
exit_conditions: Reviewer unit/eval cover both profiles, stale state, provenance and false-positive controls
Planner/Reviewer/Executor joint regression covers approval, stage and final lifecycle
all deterministic suites avoid Agent and network execution

stages.title: 三 Skill CI、文档与安装面收口
forbidden_changes: workflow secrets or network-dependent tests
branch filters that skip ordinary branches
unrelated skill behavior changes
skill-evaluation-lab semantic code-review expansion unless required for static structure
entry_conditions: README and workflow inventory of current skills understood
exit_conditions: all-branch three-OS workflow runs Planner, Reviewer and Executor suites
README/CHANGELOG describe current-only breaking contract and ownership
skill installation auto-discovers reviewer and static skill evaluation completes

stages.title: 最终审查、回归与交付
allowed_changes: all files approved by STG-01 through STG-05
minimal fixes discovered by final review
forbidden_changes: new feature scope or third profile
compatibility layer for old review contracts
automatic remote push or external review write
claiming fresh-context semantic evidence when user did not run it
entry_conditions: no unresolved blocking/major findings from stage reviews
working tree scope matches approved change map
exit_conditions: all required local validations and final code-review receipt pass on current target
git diff check, docs, skill validators and cross-skill lifecycle are clean
commit occurs only if separately authorized; otherwise delivery records no commit

nonfunctional_requirements.summary: 确定性脚本仅用 Python 3.12 标准库，同一目标在 Windows、Linux、macOS 产生一致 canonical digest
路径越界、目标不可读、schema 漂移、digest stale、证据缺失或 writer 越权一律 fail closed，写报告使用原子替换且不泄露秘密
SKILL.md 遵循 progressive disclosure，两个 profile 分开描述，shared contract 只有一个权威 reference，不复制长清单
不增加 daemon、数据库、缓存、模型服务或第三方运行依赖；none/小 scope 路径保持有界文件读取和低启动成本
review 输出以 relevance、comprehensiveness、conciseness、actionability 和 hallucination control 为质量目标，并披露未覆盖范围
review schema、target canonicalization 和 validator 只有一个实现，Planner/Executor 通过稳定 CLI 集成，避免三份规则漂移
单测、eval 和 CI 不需要 secrets、网络、目标代码执行、Codex、模型 API 或子代理，失败证据可复现且可定位

acceptance_criteria.summary: 给出规划或代码审查任务时，skill 只路由到对应 profile；混合、未知或越界请求被澄清或拆分，不退回一套通用清单
receipt 缺字段、含未知字段、开放计数错误、profile/scope 不匹配或 target 无法重建时，validator 返回稳定 REVIEW 错误并 fail closed
receipt 生成后任一目标文件或 Git identity 改变时，Planner/Executor 门禁拒绝旧 digest，只有完整新 attempt 可以恢复通过
plan-review 对必需规划 lenses 逐项记录 evidence/status，存在开放 blocking/major、阻塞 lens 或关键限制时不能 verdict passed
managed plan 没有当前 plan-bundle 的 plan-review passed receipt，或 receipt profile、digest、finding 状态错误时，approval checker 明确拒绝
code-review 可对 stage-delta、final-integration 和 standalone target 生成同一契约下的 scope-specific receipt，且不新增第三个 profile
Executor 缺少当前 stage-delta receipt 时不能完成 stage，缺少当前 final-integration receipt 时不能完成 task，wrong-scope/stale report 均被拒绝
reviewer 工作流前后 target digest 不变，唯一写入位于显式 review artifact 目录，provenance 真实披露 same/fresh/external/human 模式
每条 finding 具有定位证据、可证伪 claim、影响、建议、confidence、severity 和 status；个人偏好或低信心猜测不能冒充 blocker
Planner/Executor 不再维护正式审查 checklist、Markdown critique canonical gate 或 development_quality=passed payload，联合 fixture 只接受新契约
deterministic eval 同时覆盖已知缺陷、clean target 和 near-miss，分别观察定位、影响、行动性、简洁性与误报约束，且不执行 Agent 或目标代码
README、CHANGELOG、skill metadata、安装发现与全分支 Windows/Ubuntu/macOS CI 均反映三 skill 边界，并生成三套 deterministic evidence

validations.command: python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/complex-coding-reviewer/tests -p test_*.py -v
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/complex-coding-planner/tests -p test_*.py -v
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/complex-coding-executor/tests -p test_*.py -v
使用 skill-evaluation-lab 对 skills/complex-coding-reviewer 执行 static-only 评估并由当前 Agent 完成语义判断，不运行 Codex 或目标代码
用户显式在 fresh task 中分别运行 plan-review 与 code-review seeded case，并导入 target hash、漏报、误报和行动性观察
验证 .github workflow 对所有分支、三个 OS 运行 Planner/Reviewer/Executor unit 与 eval，并上传三套 evidence
git diff --check，并静态确认 Planner/Executor 不再包含 canonical review checklist、旧 critique regex 或 development_quality review payload

reapproval_triggers: 新增第三个 review profile、改变 reviewer writer 边界或允许自动修改 target
review receipt、target canonicalization、severity/verdict、stale 或 supersedes 语义发生实质变化
Planner approval、Executor stage/final、ledger payload、stage DAG 或 required validation 边界变化
引入第三方运行依赖、后台服务、模型调用、自动 Codex/子代理、远端写入、Git write 或 secrets
实现需要修改 change map 之外的其它 skill 公共行为或保留旧契约兼容层
active task pointer 冲突不能按批准的四态策略安全解决
stop_conditions: 用户请求暂停或尚未批准 implementation
任一 reapproval trigger 发生
当前 target 无法安全重建、路径越界或审查证据缺失
blocking/major finding 或 required validation 在有界修复后仍未关闭
需要自动 Agent/模型调用、远端写入、提权或新增依赖但未获得相应批准
非终态 active task pointer 属于另一任务
无法真实声明 reviewer provenance 或关键专业 lens 需要不可用的 expert
